title: Add healing-phase training submission (1.205 val_bpb)
author: luccifer00
body:
This PR adds a new training variant based on late-layer factorization plus a final healing phase (reduced LR and WD near the end of training).

Best validated result so far:
- 1.205 val_bpb roundtrip
- 8x H100 full run

Main ideas:
- factorized late layers
- stable optimizer settings
- final healing schedule for refinement

The file is self-contained and follows the existing train_gpt_* pattern.
